name: Obelisk Foundry
short_description: Build orbital factories, mine asteroids & trade with aliens in this deep space strategy game! Research tech, manage production chains, and choose: peaceful trade or combat when mysterious ships arrive. The ultimate industrial space empire simulator!
detailed_description:
Build Your Industrial Empire Among the Stars!

In this deep space construction and strategy game, you'll start with a humble orbital outpost and gradually develop into an industrial powerhouse dominating entire star systems. Through meticulous production line planning, optimized resource allocation, and crucial technological research, you'll establish your foothold in the cold, unforgiving cosmos.

Your primary mission is to exploit the rich resources of our solar system's asteroid belts, establishing complete industrial production chains. But when your technology reaches certain milestones, mysterious alien traders will appear, bringing new opportunities and challenges...

🏗️ Modular Space Base Construction

  • Expand from a basic platform into a multifunctional space complex

  • Construct specialized zones: refineries, manufacturing centers, power stations, storage modules

  • Optimize spatial layouts for maximum production efficiency

  • Upgrade buildings to enhance overall output as you progress

⛏️ Precision Resource Extraction & Processing

  • Command mining fleets to harvest various minerals from carefully designed asteroid belts

  • Establish complete production lines: from raw ore to refined materials to advanced industrial products

  • Manage complex logistics networks to coordinate mining, transportation, and production

  • Overcome strategic challenges posed by uneven resource distribution

🔧 Technology Research & Industrial Advancement

  • Develop practical industrial technologies to improve extraction and production efficiency

  • Unlock new building modules and more advanced spacecraft designs

  • Each technological breakthrough opens new developmental possibilities

  • Your tech level directly affects interactions with alien visitors

🛸 Unique Alien Trading System

  • Mysterious merchant vessels visit when your industrial might reaches certain thresholds

  • Trade your manufactured space fighters for precious rare resources

  • These special resources are crucial for late-game progression

  • Alternatively, choose to attack and seize them - but at your own risk

  • Your choices will impact subsequent gameplay

⚡ Challenges & Crisis Management

  • Address production bottlenecks and energy shortages

  • Deal with realistic challenges like spacecraft wear and equipment aging

  • Prevent potential space accidents and random emergencies

Key Features

✅ Authentic Space Industry Simulation - Experience complete production chains from mining to manufacturing
✅ Deep Strategic Gameplay - Every decision affects your development efficiency
✅ Unique Alien Interactions - Trade or fight, the choice is yours
✅ Carefully Designed Asteroid Belt System - Each zone presents unique mining challenges
✅ Highly Flexible Construction System - No fixed development path, build your ideal space facility
